more.title: One person requires US$50,46 for total monthly expenses – Zimsat
more.description: A single person now requires the equivalent of US$50.46 per month to meet basic expenses, according to the latest data from the Zimbabwe National Statistics Agency (ZimStat). The Total Consumption Poverty Line (TCPL) in Zimbabwe represents the minimum cost of a basket of food and non-food items needed per individual per month to avoid being [...] The post One person requires US$50,46 for total monthly expenses – Zimsat appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.title: Warriors lift Mukuru Four Nations tournament trophy
more.description: Saisada Kafuni’s 86th-minute own goal handed Zimbabwe a 1-0 victory over Zambia, securing the Four Nations Tournament trophy in a final played at Obed Itani Chilume Stadium in Francistown, Botswana. The match got off to a slow start, with both sides producing a dull first half that offered little excitement for the spectators. After the [...] The post Warriors lift Mukuru Four Nations tournament trophy appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.title: South Africa and Zambia Move to Shield Economies from Global Fuel Price Shock
more.description: JOHANNESBURG / LUSAKA — Governments in South Africa and Zambia have rolled out emergency policy measures to cushion consumers and stabilise their economies as global oil prices surge following escalating tensions involving Iran, Israel and the United States. The coordinated, though structurally different, responses underscore the growing vulnerability of oil-importing economies to external energy shocks, [...] The post South Africa and Zambia Move to Shield Economies from Global Fuel Price Shock appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Filling stations across South Africa run out of petrol and diesel
more.description: Many filling stations across South Africa have run out of petrol and diesel ahead of the big price increases on 1 April 2026. more.title: Econet InfraCo Faces Rising Macro Risks as Middle East Conflict Reshapes Global Digital Economy
more.description: HARARE — Zimbabwe’s emerging digital infrastructure ambitions, anchored around Econet Wireless Zimbabwe and its broader ecosystem, including Cassava Technologies and Liquid Intelligent Technologies, are increasingly colliding with a rapidly deteriorating global macroeconomic and geopolitical environment. more.title: Zimbabwe Grapples with Deepening Public Transport Crisis as Fares Surge by 70%
more.description: HARARE — Zimbabwe is facing a worsening public transport crisis after fares surged by as much as 70 percent, leaving thousands of commuters stranded and intensifying the cost-of-living pressures across urban centres. The sharp increase, driven largely by rising fuel costs, has disrupted daily commuting patterns, with transport operators rapidly adjusting fares to preserve already [...] The post Zimbabwe Grapples with Deepening Public Transport Crisis as Fares Surge by 70% appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .
